items.title: Home Depot: The Canary In The Coal Mine
ETFs in Spotlight as Tesla Tops Q4 Earnings, Dips on Revenue Miss
items.description: ETFs move into focus after Tesla beats on Q4 EPS but misses on revenues, sending shares lower despite record energy storage and heavy AI spending plans.

items.title: Brokers Suggest Investing in Home Depot (HD): Read This Before Placing a Bet
items.description: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Home Depot (HD) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

items.title: The Home Depot, Inc. (HD) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
items.description: Recently, Zacks.com users have been paying close attention to Home Depot (HD). This makes it worthwhile to examine what the stock has in store.
